name: Feature request
about: A new tool, a flag on an existing tool, or a behavioral change.
labels: enhancement

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- Describe the user-facing situation. "I tried to ask Claude X, and there
was no tool to call" is more useful than "we should add tool Y". -->

## Proposed surface

```python
# Tool signature you'd want.
some_tool(arg: str, ...) -> SomeResponse
```

## Why this belongs in `mcp-wandb` and not the official server

<!-- See docs/relationship-to-official.md. If the feature could equally live
in `wandb/wandb-mcp-server`, please raise it there too. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you tried; other tools that almost-but-not-quite work. -->

## Roadmap fit

- [ ] I checked `ROADMAP.md` and this isn't already planned
- [ ] I'd be willing to send a PR
